creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Leonid Vasiliev from comment #6)
> Hello, this problem repeats again:
> 
> NAGIOS4_CONFIGURE_WITH= nagios4
> 
> always build with NAGIOS4 support...

The new maintainer has undone my commit, which is a shame.  There is little point
in me fixing this again if it's undone soon after.  Assigning to maintainer
to hopefully reapply the change from ports r485075.
